'''zadhogo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:crabtree|crabtree]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-dh-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:crabtree|crabtree]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| zadhogo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zædhegeth|zædhegeth]] || [[word:zædhegej|zædhegej]] || [[word:zædhegesh|zædhegesh]] || [[word:zædhege|zædhege]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zadhodhogoth|zadhodhogoth]] || [[word:zadhodhogoj|zadhodhogoj]] || [[word:zadhodhogosh|zadhodhogosh]] || [[word:zadhodhogo|zadhodhogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zadhogoth|zadhogoth]] || [[word:zadhogoj|zadhogoj]] || [[word:zadhogosh|zadhogosh]] || [[word:zadhogo|zadhogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zadhofgoth|zadhofgoth]] || [[word:zadhofgoj|zadhofgoj]] || [[word:zadhofgosh|zadhofgosh]] || [[word:zadhofgof|zadhofgof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zadhogotho|zadhogotho]] || [[word:zadhogojo|zadhogojo]] || [[word:zadhogosho|zadhogosho]] || [[word:zadhogoko|zadhogoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zadhogoth|zadhogoth]] || [[word:zadhogoj|zadhogoj]] || [[word:zadhogosh|zadhogosh]] || [[word:zadhogo|zadhogo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zadhogothol|zadhogothol]] || [[word:zadhogojol|zadhogojol]] || [[word:zadhogoshol|zadhogoshol]] || [[word:zadhogokol|zadhogokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zadhogothotho|zadhogothotho]] || [[word:zadhogojojo|zadhogojojo]] || [[word:zadhogoshosho|zadhogoshosho]] || [[word:zadhogoko|zadhogoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zadhogothon|zadhogothon]] || [[word:zadhogojon|zadhogojon]] || [[word:zadhogoshon|zadhogoshon]] || [[word:zadhogokon|zadhogokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zadhogothoro|zadhogothoro]] || [[word:zadhogojoro|zadhogojoro]] || [[word:zadhogoshoro|zadhogoshoro]] || [[word:zadhogokoro|zadhogokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|28ebc72}}
